iran_nuke.notes: Day 19 00:00 - IMMINENT 100. 440kg HEU still under IAEA monitoring. Hidden HEU in underground facility unresolved. Araghchi confirms stockpile. No diplomatic path. Nuclear test not conducted but breakout capability remains.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 19 01:00 - IMMINENT 100. UAE airspace fully closed. Dubai airport fire contained, limited flights resume. Trump vents frustration at allies for refusing Hormuz coalition — zero commitments. Saudi intercepts 37 drones. Iran FM Araghchi on CBS: 'We never asked for ceasefire or negotiation.' Witkoff-Araghchi channel reportedly reactivated per Axios. Israel new wave strikes on Tehran. 1,444 Iran dead, 18,551 injured.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 19 01:00 - IMMINENT 100. IDF launches 'limited' ground operations in new areas of southern Lebanon. Defense Minister: displaced won't return until northern Israel safe. Military seeks to mobilize 450,000 reservists. 5 Western leaders (CA/FR/DE/IT/UK) urge Israel to avert 'significant ground offensive.' Hezbollah rocket barrage wounds 6 in northern Israel. Beirut apartment struck.

turkey.notes: Day 19 00:00 - IMMINENT 92. NATO strain deepening. EU "no appetite" for Red Sea naval mission extension. Trump threatens NATO over Hormuz. Multiple NATO missile intercepts over Turkey remain unresolved.

india.notes: Day 19 00:00 - ELEVATED 25. India evacuates nationals from ME. Diplomatic balancing act. Pakistan-Afghanistan war next door increasing regional pressure. No direct escalation signals.

russia.notes: Day 19 00:00 - IMMINENT 87. Russia continues arms support to Iran. Ukraine peace talks frozen due to ME war. No direct ME intervention yet but strategic exploitation ongoing.

china.notes: Day 19 00:00 - CRITICAL 42. China coast guard blockade rehearsals. Large-scale military flights resume near Taiwan. Taiwan announces $40B defense budget. Trump Beijing visit March 31 confirmed by WH.

north_korea.notes: Day 19 00:00 - IMMINENT 78. 10 MRL missiles fired March 14 during US-SK drills. Kim observed with daughter. Exploiting US security gap in ME. No new signals since update.

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 19 00:00 - IMMINENT 100. Russia escalates Kharkiv offensive. Biden surprise Kyiv visit. 97 drones launched. Ukraine recaptured 400km2 in Feb (first month gains > losses since 2024). Storm Shadow hits Bryansk electronics factory. 6 killed in air attacks.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 19 00:00 - IMMINENT 100. Pakistan strikes Kabul hospital - Afghanistan claims 400 killed. UNSC resolution passed. China mediates. Open war confirmed. Civilian toll now 475+ dead across conflict.

top_signals: BREAKING: IDF launches ground operations in southern Lebanon — 450K reservists to be mobilized
5 Western leaders urge Israel not to invade Lebanon — 'devastating humanitarian consequences'
Israel plans to strike 'thousands' of targets over next 3 weeks
UAE fully closes airspace as 'exceptional precautionary measure'
Trump vents frustration at allies for zero Hormuz coalition commitments
Iran FM Araghchi: 'We never asked for ceasefire or negotiation'
IRGC claims most weapons cache intact — hasn't fired post-12-day-war missiles
Saudi intercepts 37 drones; Bahrain, Kuwait, Qatar also report interceptions
Pakistan strikes Kabul hospital — Afghanistan claims 400 killed
Russia escalates Kharkiv offensive, 97 drones launched; Biden surprise Kyiv visit

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: STABLE (Day 19 00:00): ZERO de-escalation signals across all theaters. Pakistan-Afghanistan hospital strike is worst single event of that conflict. Iran FM explicitly rejects ceasefire. China mediating Pak-Afg is only diplomatic signal but no ceasefire materialized. All conflicts intensifying.

latest_news.headline: IDF launches 'limited' ground operations in southern Lebanon
latest_news.text: Israeli military announces ground manoeuvre into new areas of southern Lebanon. Defense minister says displaced Lebanese won't return until northern Israel safe. Military seeking to mobilize 450,000 reservists.

latest_news.headline: 5 Western leaders urge Israel to avert 'significant ground offensive' in Lebanon
latest_news.text: Canada, France, Germany, Italy, UK issue joint statement expressing 'grave concern' — warn of 'devastating humanitarian consequences.'

latest_news.headline: Trump vents frustration at allies over Strait of Hormuz coalition
latest_news.text: Trump criticizes allies for rebuffing appeals for assistance in keeping Strait of Hormuz open. Zero coalition commitments received.

latest_news.headline: Witkoff-Araghchi communications channel reportedly reactivated
latest_news.text: Axios reports direct communications channel between US envoy Witkoff and Iran FM Araghchi reactivated in recent days. Araghchi attempting to engage about ending war.

latest_news.headline: IDF launches new wave of strikes on Tehran
latest_news.text: IDF announces 'wide-scale wave of strikes targeting Iranian terror regime infrastructure in Tehran.' Iran Red Crescent clinic damaged.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 19 01:04) - Global war probability 100%. Seven zones at/near IMMINENT. MAJOR ESCALATION: Israel launches ground invasion of southern Lebanon despite 5 Western leaders urging restraint. 450K reservists to be mobilized. Iran war Day 19 — Tehran strikes continue, Iran FM rejects all ceasefire talk. Trump isolated on Hormuz coalition. Pakistan-Afghanistan civilian toll mounting. No ceasefire frameworks in any theater. Situation deteriorating across all theaters.
